---
title: "William Wallace"
---

## William Wallace

**Dates:** (<i>c.</i>1272-1305)

### Description

Scottish patriot

### Biography

The \'new\' view of Wallace to which CMY refers in 1861 was perhaps the celebratory one which led to plans for a national monument.

### Letters

- Letter from March 18th 1861
- Letter from Feb 26th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
